generated_oml:
instance PhysicalTwinSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors on the Physical Twin collecting data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorData
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalTwinSensor
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data sourced from sensors on the Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD representations of physical components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic systems described by differential equations for motion analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Capturing cyber-physical interactions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms that update model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, OptimizationService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithms that detect faults in system components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, ControlService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithms that estimate system states from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictiveService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithms that enhance system efficiency by discovering causes and effects"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Assess safety and optimal operational performance using real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight, OperationalEfficiencyInsight
]

instance PredictiveService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulations that reproduce and forecast Physical Twin behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhance system efficiency by discovering causes and effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enact physical adjustments upon detecting system violations"
    DTDFVocab:provides CorrectiveAction
]

instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time assessment of system safety"
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of operational efficiency"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted behavior of Physical Twin under current conditions"
]

instance EfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insights for system efficiency"
]

instance CorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Initiated to rectify system violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms continuously update model parameters to match the Physical Twin's current state, ensuring model fidelity. Monitors verify system performance against safety and optimality criteria, detecting violations which initiate corrective actions through human or algorithmic intervention."
]
